request.reason: The previous query returned no results, likely because the containment hierarchy or the way messages are linked to models is different than assumed. I will explore the structure of the model with the given ID to find how messages are connected.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name
WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model ;
         tai:originalId "6c9090aeef814120944b4885c7343b63" .
  ?elem tai:belongsTo+ ?model .
  ?elem a ?type .
  OPTIONAL { ?elem bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 50
